meaning: n.狭窄部分,海峡,隘路adj.狭窄的,精密的,严密的,有限的,气量小的,勉强的,眼光短浅的vi.变窄vt.使变狭窄,使缩小
examples: He turned into a narrow street.
Access was via a narrow archway.
They rode along narrow country lanes.
We eat neat, narrow triangles of four-month-old clarissa cheese, made by hand by Lino.
About 500m in, it started to narrow, forcing us into single file as it scythed upwards.
